title: Warmiehomy Remote Control Cars for Boys 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 Year, 8WD RC Stunt Car with LED Light Music Spray, 360° Rotating, Gesture and 2.4GHz Remote Control, RC Drift Car Toys for Kids Gift
features: 【2 Control Mode】Remote control car for 6 7 8 9 10 Year Old Kids support gesture sensing control and 2.4 GHz hand remote control. Upgraded transmission technology, offers precise control, anti-interference and ultra-long distance control and allows you to control it effortlessly by simply waving your hand or using hand gestures.

【8WD Gesture Remote Control Car】Boys rc stunt car support 360° rotating, all-round drift, double-sided drive, automatic demonstration, and twist into different deformation: Drift mode, Straight line mode,Stunt mode,Standing mode, Climbing mode,Acceleration mode. 360° swring arms design, no matter what obstacles encountered, it can easily climb steps and obstacles.

【All-terrain Capabilities & Music Light Spray】8WD design, 360° rotating, free to switch into multiple modes, can conquers both indoor and outdoor obstacles, climb steps and overcome gravel, sand, meadow, etc. Hand controlled car is designed with light, music and cool spray fuction. With the switch button, you can chose open or close music or lifght. Open water injection holes to add water, press the spray button can send out the spray, enhancing the visual impact and making the whole driving experience more dazzling.

【Long Playing Time】 Rc stunt drift car with light & music is equipped with 1 rechargeable 3.7V/900mAh Battery, support one hour on a full charge. Kids can play with it at home, in the backyard, at the park, indoors, outdoors, or wherever they want without constantly replacing batteries.

【Perfect Gift】Remote control car is made of premium material with strong structure, anti-collision, anti-shock，which is safe and harmless, absolutely a great gift for boys aged 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 12 years old on birthday, new year, holidays, Children's Day and Christmas,Thanksgiving or any special occasion.
